amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 6 — paragraph 2 a (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 6 — paragraph 2 a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

2 b. Providers that misclassify their AI system as not subject to the requirements of Title III Chapter 2 of this Regulation and place it on the market before the deadline for objection by national supervisory authorities shall be subject to fines pursuant to Article 71.
parliament_text: 2 b. Providers that misclassify their AI system as not subject to the requirements of Title III Chapter 2 of this Regulation and place it on the market before the deadline for objection by national supervisory authorities shall be subject to fines pursuant to Article 71.
